description: Agent that allows you control an existing browser window

website.description: Enhanced website indexing with knowledge extraction

schema.description: Browser agent that allows you control browser windows and perform actions such as web browsing (opening, closing, reading pages), opening a new tab, closing a tab, scrolling, zooming and navigating to a specific URL.
Actions to lookup information from the web and answer user queries.
Actions to control open, close and switching external browser windows and tabs, add bookmarks and open websites based on history and bookmarks.
This helps users to inspect a page and find the possible actions they can take on it.
Manage and execute reusable browser automation flows. List, delete, and edit scope of saved WebFlows.
